title: Using formula column in integration

posts.author: Ramarm (Ram Perel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone!
I have a client who want to make an action like a formula action everytime a status column is changing.
I tried creating a custom action but I saw that formula column or just a formula is not an option there. Is there any other way to do that?
Maybe creating a custom field? The problem is that its not a list or a text, and dynamic mapping according to the documentation is not the right usage

thanks!
